name: New Potato and Red Onion Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen artichoke hearts, defrosted or
18 ounces canned artichoke hearts, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the potatoes and cook until tender, about 15 to 20 minutes.
2. Drain the potatoes and quarter if they are large.
3. In a large bowl, toss the cooked potatoes with the artichoke hearts, red onions, and vinaigrette.
4. Season the mixture to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Sprinkle with the shaved Parmesan cheese before serving.
